data.name: Hentai Pieces
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Hentai Pieces!

I'll be your guide as you navigate through these horny, sexy girls! You'll fall in love with these girls in no time!

Unique Gameplay

Drag, rotate, and drop Voronoi pieces to complete images of cute girls. Once you crack each image, you'll be rewarded with a fullscreen fully animated video of the girl (plus, a surprise)!

Key Features:

  • HD rendered Art: Each girl has been rendered in HD for your pleasure!

  • Simple Puzzles: Each puzzle is meant to be relaxing and intuitive!

  • Unique girls: Each has girl has been crafted with a unique appeal. Which will be your favourite?

  • Relaxing Music: Take a break, and enjoy lo-fi beats as you complete your favourite puzzles.

  • Achievements: Unlock Steam achievements for completing levels!

Try it now! Don't forget to Wishlist it and be sure to check out our other games!

data.short_description: Drag and drop puzzle pieces to complete animated images of beautiful, anime women! Progress through this episodic game to unlock hotter, sexier scenes! Fully animated, relaxing hentai reassemble game!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 日文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: Any modern processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any GPU with OpenGL or DirectX 9 support
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any GPU with OpenGL or DirectX 9 support
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Any modern Linux distribution
  • 處理器: 64-bit quad-core processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Any GPU that supports Vulkan
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
